news.title: Big tech earnings to test AI rally as markets enter crucial week
news.description: Big Tech earnings from Alphabet, Tesla and Intel will test the AI rally as investors assess cloud growth, chip demand, capital spending, guidance and macro risks amid geopolitical tensions and rate uncertainty.

news.title: Rupee weakens to two-month low as oil climbs; state-run banks cushion
news.description: The Indian rupee reached its weakest point in two months on Monday.  Rising oil prices and Middle East hostilities pressured the currency's value.  State-run banks sold dollars, which helped to moderate the rupee's decline.  Higher crude prices can create macroeconomic turbulence for India's economy

news.title: PC Jeweller shares jump 6%: What’s driving the rally after 220% gains in 3 years?
news.description: PC Jeweller shares jumped about 6% after its board approved raising up to Rs 1,000 crore through a QIP, nearly reversing Friday’s losses. The rebound also comes amid strong Q1 revenue growth and the company’s progress toward becoming debt-free.

news.title: Global Market: China's securities regulator to meet market participants as state-backed investors step in to support stocks
news.description: China's securities regulator will meet market participants to discuss equity market stabilization. State-backed investors are also buying shares to help arrest the decline. news.title: The FIFA World Cup Halftime Show Breaks A Longstanding Tradition
news.description: For 96 years, the FIFA World Cup final has observed the same halftime tradition: fifteen minutes of punditry, tactical analysis and players regrouping in the tunnel. On July 19, that changes.

news.title: London Landlords Head for the Exit as Rent Laws Deal Final Blow
news.description: Landlords in the UK have been feeling the squeeze for a decade. For many, new legislation designed to strengthen the rights of tenants is the final straw.
